JURY TRIAL SET FOR MAR-08-2021 CONTINUED TO MAR-16-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 220. THE COURT ORDERS COUNSEL TO MEET AND CONFER ON THE FOLLOWING: JOINT TIME ESTIMATES FOR EACH WITNESS; TOTAL TIME ESTIMATE FOR TRIAL; JUROR QUESTIONNAIRE (TO INCLUDE COVID-19 QUESTIONS); JOINT STATEMENT OF THE CASE; PEREMPTORY CHALLENGES FOR EACH PARTY; PROPOSED SPECIAL VERDICT FORM; JURY INSTRUCTIONS; AND EXHIBITS. COUNSEL TO ALSO CONSIDER IF SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WOULD BE HELPFUL TO RESOLVING THE MATTER. THE COURT ALSO NOTICES COUNSEL TO PREPARE FOR THE POSSIBILITY OF A SHORT TRIAL DAY DUE TO COVID CONCERNS.
